created_by_slice: P90 PyPI Metadata Connector Runtime Planning v0
worktree_status: P90 artifacts generated after initial clean inspection.
runtime_boundary: P90 is planning-only. It does not implement the PyPI metadata connector runtime, does not call PyPI APIs, does not fetch package metadata, release metadata, or file metadata, does not download wheels, sdists, package files, or package archives, does not install packages, invoke pip, resolve dependencies, inspect package archives, execute setup.py or build scripts, run source sync jobs, write source-cache or evidence-ledger records, wire public search to live calls, enable arbitrary package fetch, downloads, mirroring, credentials, tokens, or telemetry, and does not mutate public, local, runtime, candidate, source-cache, evidence-ledger, or master indexes.
connector_runtime_architecture_plan: future client.py bounded package metadata client
future dependency_policy.py dependency metadata caution guard
future normalize.py source-cache package summary normalizer
future evidence.py evidence observation candidate builder
source_sync_job_flow: source policy guard checks connector approval
package identity guard validates approved package-name source
dependency metadata caution guard verifies metadata-only handling
token/auth guard verifies token-free v0 unless future policy approves otherwise
bounded failure record without raw payload
package_identity_review_normalization_pl: Allowed future package-name sources are reviewed source records, reviewed search needs, source pack records, manual observation records, and fixture examples. Raw public query parameters, private packages, credentialed indexes, alternate indexes without future approval, localhost URLs, file URLs, uploaded files, local paths, and arbitrary URLs are forbidden.
validation_normalization_plan: Validate response shape, package name, project metadata, release versions, release dates, file metadata summaries, yanked status, requires_python, classifiers, dependency metadata without dependency resolution, checksum/digest metadata when present as metadata, source attribution, error envelopes, raw payload exclusion, wheel/sdist/package file exclusion, and private package/index redaction or rejection.
failure_retry_timeout_circuit_breaker_pl: Timeouts, bounded retries, retry-after/abuse-limit backoff, per-source rate limits, circuit breaker, no retry storms, no public-search blocking, no raw error leaks, and operator-visible summaries are required.
public_search_boundary: Public search must not call PyPI live or accept arbitrary package parameters for live fetch; future cards may only read reviewed public-safe summaries after separate runtime and review.
privacy_rights_risk_review: Package-metadata-only with package identity review and dependency metadata caution; no private packages, token-required indexes, alternate indexes without future policy, wheel/sdist/package file download, package archive inspection, package install, dependency resolution, package manager invocation, downloads, mirroring, install, execute, credentials, private account access, rights clearance claim, file safety claim, installability claim, dependency safety claim, vulnerability claim, or malware safety claim.
security_abuse_review: Rate limits, timeout, circuit breaker, User-Agent/contact, token-free default, cache requirement, kill switch, no public fanout, package identity guard, dependency metadata guard, source policy guard, token/auth guard, and operator approval are required.
